name: Sample Inventory
description: Biological and chemical sample inventory management with chain-of-custody tracking. Researchers locate, log, and audit every sample in the lab.

page_briefs.samples: Sample library view. Persistent search-filter bar across the top with facets for sample type, freezer, project, and date range. Grid sample tracker below renders each sample as a tile with barcode, label, storage location, and availability chip for quick scanning.
page_briefs.sample-detail: Full sample provenance page. Standard detail header shows sample ID, type, origin, current custodian, and action buttons. Timeline sample tracker visualizes the chain-of-custody events from collection through aliquots, transfers, and analyses with signer names and timestamps.

shells.sidebar-main: Authenticated app shell with sidebar navigation and main content area
